item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stayed in direct execution mode and analyzed the three count-only complaint incidents without firing a triage framework or stopping for methodized clarification.
